# fastly_service_acl (Resource)

Fastly service ACL resource. Writes directly to the specified writable service version.



## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name to identify this ACL. Must be unique within the service.
- `service_id` (String) Fastly service ID.
- `version` (Number) Writable Fastly service version to modify.

### Optional

- `force_destroy` (Boolean) Allow the ACL to be deleted, even if it contains entries. Default `false`.

### Read-Only

- `acl_id` (String) The ID of the ACL.
- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier.
